Platform pembelajaran untuk sekolah rend: A learning platform for primary schools.
Tonton semula rakaman kelas cikgu, muat: Rewatch your teachers' class recordings, download materials, and try quizzes. Everything is organised by subject, year and chapter.
Video kelas cikgu, terus di dalam platfo: Your teacher's class videos, right inside this platform.
Jawab soalan dan dapat markah serta-mert: Answer questions and get your score instantly.
Kumpul mata dan lihat kedudukan anda dal: Collect points and see where you rank within your Year.
Muat naik rakaman kelas terus dari peran: Upload class recordings straight from your device, or paste a YouTube link from your own account. Students watch them without leaving the platform.
Susun kandungan ikut Subjek, Tahun dan B: Organise content by Subject, Year and Chapter.

Bina soalan aneka pilihan terus di dalam: Build multiple-choice questions right in the system. Students answer online and get their score instantly. This type of quiz gives leaderboard points.

Gambaran keseluruhan guru, penyumbang te: An overview of teachers, top contributors, and the best-performing content.
Gambaran keseluruhan murid dan aktiviti: An overview of students and their activity on the platform.
Bahan dimuat turun tidak direkodkan per: Material downloads are not recorded per student — only a total per file. Pass means :percent% or more.
Tiga murid paling aktif bagi setiap Tahu: The three most active students in each Year. Activity = videos viewed + quiz attempts + favourites. It measures participation, not marks — so it differs from the Ranking board students see.
Belum ada aktiviti murid untuk Tahun ini: No student activity for this Year yet.
Menyahaktifkan menghalang guru daripada: Deactivating only stops the teacher signing in. Their videos, materials and quizzes stay published for students.
Akaun :name telah dinyahaktifkan. Kandun: Account :name has been deactivated. Their content stays live for students.
Akaun ini telah dinyahaktifkan. Sila hub: This account has been deactivated. Please contact your school administrator.
Sepuluh guru dengan kandungan diterbitka: The ten teachers with the most published content.
Kandungan diterbitkan = video + bahan +: Published content = published videos + materials + quizzes.
Tiada guru dengan kandungan diterbitkan: No teachers with published content match this filter.
Semua bahan bantu mengajar yang dimuat n: Every teaching material uploaded by teachers, across all subjects and Years.
Semua kuiz yang dibina oleh guru, merent: Every quiz built by teachers, across all subjects and Years.
Lulus bermaksud percubaan mencapai :perc: Pass means an attempt scored :percent% or more. Every completed attempt is counted, retries included.

Guru ini belum ada video yang dikira unt: This teacher has no videos counted toward the talent score yet.
Muat naik video, atau sambungkan channel: Upload a video, or connect your YouTube channel so your YouTube videos count.
Video rujukan (tidak dikira untuk skor): Reference videos (not counted toward the score)
Petunjuk penglibatan murid terhadap vide: A signal of student engagement with your own videos (uploads + verified-own YouTube). It helps MOE identify high-potential teachers for closer review.
Beza markah kuiz penonton vs purata bab: Watchers' quiz score vs the chapter average
perlu sekurang-kurangnya :min untuk skor: needs at least :min for a score
Skor ini mencerminkan penglibatan dalam: This score reflects in-platform engagement (student views, favourites and quiz outcomes) on a teacher's own content only. It is a signal for closer MOE review — not a definitive measure of teaching quality, and it does not use YouTube's public view count.
Sambungkan akaun YouTube anda supaya vid: Connect your YouTube account so your videos count
Sahkan pemilikan channel YouTube anda su: Verify ownership of your YouTube channel so your own YouTube videos count toward the talent score. We only read your channel list — no tokens are stored.
Belum ada channel disambung. Video YouTu: No channel connected yet. Your YouTube videos count as references until you connect.
Putuskan sambungan channel ini? Video Yo: Disconnect this channel? YouTube videos from this channel will no longer count toward your talent score.
This Google account has no YouTube channel.
Sambungan YouTube tidak berjaya. Sila cu: The YouTube connection was unsuccessful. Please try again.
Tidak dapat membaca channel YouTube anda: Could not read your YouTube channels right now. Please try again shortly.
Channel \":title\" telah dituntut oleh g: Channel ":title" has already been claimed by another teacher. Please contact an administrator if this is a mistake.
:count video kini dikira sebagai kandung: :count video(s) now count as your content.
Video ini bukan dari channel YouTube and: This video is not from your YouTube channel, so it does not count toward your talent score. Students can still watch it.
Ini video anda sendiri? Sambungkan akaun: Is this your own video? Connect your YouTube account so it counts toward your talent score.
Pengesahan pemilikan video tertangguh (m: Video ownership verification is deferred (a temporary network issue). It will be re-checked when you edit this video.
Video ini peribadi atau telah dipadam. S: This video is private or has been deleted. Please set it to Unlisted or Public.
Senarai untuk semakan MOE — guru berpote: A list for MOE review — high-potential teachers identified from in-platform student engagement, paired with human judgement.
Penglibatan = tontonan unik + kegemaran: Engagement = unique views + favourites (weighted). Quality = favourite rate per viewer. Outcome = watchers' quiz score vs the chapter average. Breadth = number of chapters.
Sambungkan akaun YouTube anda supaya vid: Connect your YouTube account so it counts toward your talent score.
Sambungan YouTube belum tersedia. Sila h: YouTube connection is not available yet. Please contact the MOE administrator.
